args.CodeContent:
"# Ordin Core Static Landing Page Walkthrough

We have successfully integrated the advanced marketing features, brand assets, interactive dropdowns, client-side theme modes, and Web3Forms serverless subscriptions into the React + TypeScript + Vite landing page located in the `landing-page/` directory.

---

## 1. Accomplished Enhancements

### 🎨 Brand Assets & Imagery Integration
* **Favicon & Logos**: Copied the brand icon from `mobile-app/assets/images/icon.png` to `/public/logo.png`. Replaced all header and footer vector placeholders in `src/App.tsx` and the favicon link tag in `index.html` with `/logo.png`.
* **System Screenshot Bezel**: Copied the actual high-resolution system dashboard screenshot from `images ref/WhatsApp Image 2026-03-25 at 12.03.37.jpeg` to `/public/screenshot.jpg`. Rendered this screenshot inside the hero section within a high-end simulated browser frame (`.oc-screenshot-frame`) featuring standard address-bar mockups (`work.ordincore.co.uk`) and mac-style window controls.

### 🌗 Light / Dark Theme Toggle
* **Theme Switching Mechanism**: Added a theme state in `src/App.tsx` synchronized with `localStorage`.
* **Dynamic Styling**: Added an effect that appends the `.dark` class directly to `document.documentElement` to transition all CSS variables smoothly between Light mode (default pale sky `#F0F6FC` base) and Dark mode (deep navy `#0B1628` base).
* **Interactive Control**: Placed a beautiful, interactive Sun/Moon toggle button right inside the navigation bar beside the CTA buttons.

### 🧭 Stateful Hover Dropdowns
* **Navigation Overlay**: Formulated state-controlled dropdowns for **Platform ▼**, **For Providers ▼**, **Resources ▼**, and **About ▼** activated using `onMouseEnter` and `onMouseLeave` triggers.
* **Menu Contents**:
  * **Platform**: Overview, Governance Signals, Risk Trajectory, Escalations & Actions, Weekly Reviews, Reporting & Analytics, Security & Compliance.
  * **Why Ordin Core**: Core single-page link scrolling/navigating to value 
<truncated 2148 bytes>
args.Description: "Writes a comprehensive walkthrough documenting system screenshot, brand icon logo, theme toggling, hover navigation dropdowns, and Web3Forms serverless newsletter subscription features."

args.CodeContent:
"# Implementation Plan - Align Governance Pulse & Patient Pattern Detection

Modify backend filtering, verify person-centric pattern worker logic, and execute production E2E deployment to ensure care governance alignment.

## User Review Required

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Team Leader House Access**: We will bypass the `user_houses` filter for Team Leaders (`TEAM_LEADER` / `TL`) in the backend houses controller. This ensures Team Leaders can select from all active houses when submitting signals, resolving empty dropdown issues. Registered Managers will remain filtered to their assigned houses to maintain correct dashboard scoping.

## Proposed Changes

### Backend Component

#### [MODIFY] [houses.controller.ts](file:///c:/Users/tanaka.majuru/Downloads/SAAS%20DOCS/Governance%20SaaS%20Application/backend/src/controllers/houses.controller.ts)
- Modify the `findAll` method to remove `TEAM_LEADER` and `TL` from the role-based houses filtering check.
- Keep the filtering logic for `REGISTERED_MANAGER` and `RM`.

#### [VERIFY] [pattern.worker.ts](file:///c:/Users/tanaka.majuru/Downloads/SAAS%20DOCS/Governance%20SaaS%20Application/backend/src/workers/pattern.worker.ts)
- Confirm that the pattern worker evaluates and clusters rules based on `related_person` (mapped to `linked_person`) in combination with `house_id` and `risk_domain`.
- Confirm that all threshold event rules (1 to 5) properly record and reference `linked_person`.

#### [VERIFY] [governance.service.ts](file:///c:/Users/tanaka.majuru/Downloads/SAAS%20DOCS/Governance%20SaaS%20Application/backend/src/services/governance.service.ts)
- Confirm that `getRiskCandidates` and `getClusters` return `linked_person` dynamically, supporting role-based anonymization for RI and Director users.

### Deployment Script

#### [NEW] [deploy_updates.js](file:///c:/Users/tanaka.majuru/Downloads/SAAS%20DOCS/Governance%20SaaS%20Application/scratch/deploy_updates.js)
- Write an SSH-based deployment script using the project's `ssh2` dev-dependency to log into `185

args.CodeContent:
"# Local Implementation Plan - Align Governance Pulse & Patient Pattern Detection

Modify local backend filtering, verify person-centric pattern worker logic, update local database schema, and perform local manual E2E validation.

## Proposed Changes

### 1. Backend Component

#### [MODIFY] [houses.controller.ts](file:///c:/Users/tanaka.majuru/Downloads/SAAS%20DOCS/Governance%20SaaS%20Application/backend/src/controllers/houses.controller.ts)
- Locate the `findAll` method.
- Remove `TEAM_LEADER` and `TL` from the role-based filtering check so that Team Leaders see all active houses in the dropdown.
- Keep the filtering logic for `REGISTERED_MANAGER` and `RM`.

#### [VERIFY] [pattern.worker.ts](file:///c:/Users/tanaka.majuru/Downloads/SAAS%20DOCS/Governance%20SaaS%20Application/backend/src/workers/pattern.worker.ts)
- Confirm that the pattern worker evaluates and clusters rules based on `related_person` (mapped to `linked_person`) in combination with `house_id` and `risk_domain`.

#### [VERIFY] [governance.service.ts](file:///c:/Users/tanaka.majuru/Downloads/SAAS%20DOCS/Governance%20SaaS%20Application/backend/src/services/governance.service.ts)
- Confirm that `getRiskCandidates` and `getClusters` return `linked_person` dynamically, supporting role-based anonymization for RI and Director users.

### 2. Local Database Schema Update

#### [NEW] [create_action_effectiveness.ts](file:///c:/Users/tanaka.majuru/Downloads/SAAS%20DOCS/Governance%20SaaS%20Application/scratch/create_action_effectiveness.ts)
- Create a scratch script to run local PostgreSQL DDL query establishing `action_effectiveness` table.

### 3. Frontend Component

#### [VERIFY] [App.tsx](file:///c:/Users/tanaka.majuru/Downloads/SAAS%20DOCS/Governance%20SaaS%20Application/frontend/src/App.tsx)
- Ensure the route `<Route path="/admin/service-users" element={<ServiceUsers />} />` is registered.

---

## Verification Plan

### Automated Verification
- Execute scratch script to verify `action_effectiveness` table is created
<truncated 730 bytes>
args.Description: "Create implementation plan for local adjustments and schema setup"

args.Description: "Updated walkthrough.md to document the Weekly Review Wizard Step Validation off-by-one bug fix and the successful pre-deployment E2E manual test suite run."
args.Instruction: "Add step validation bug details under Bug Fixes, and reference the E2E test results in walkthrough.md."
args.ReplacementContent:
"3. **Weekly Review Wizard Step Validation (`POST /api/v1/weekly-reviews` 400 Bad Request):**
   - **Root Cause:** The wizard step validation logic in `backend/src/services/weeklyReviews.service.ts` evaluated mandatory fields of the `targetStep` that the user was currently navigating *to*, rather than the completed step they were navigating *away* from. This blocked the user from entering steps like Step 8 (Interpretation), Step 12 (Decisions), and Step 14 (Overall Position) since these fields were naturally empty before the user reached and filled them.
   - **Resolution:** Modified `validateStepDependency` to check mandatory fields of `targetStep - 1`. This allows users to navigate freely into each step and strictly enforces completion only when leaving the step.

---

## 🚀 Patient Validation, UI Autocomplete, & Wizard Flow Fixes"

content: I will correct the walkthrough.md absolute path to point to the App Data directory (`.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/...`) and update the file contents.

args.ReplacementContent:
"3. **Weekly Review Wizard Step Validation (`POST /api/v1/weekly-reviews` 400 Bad Request):**
   - **Root Cause:** The wizard step validation logic in `backend/src/services/weeklyReviews.service.ts` evaluated mandatory fields of the `targetStep` that the user was currently navigating *to*, rather than the completed step they were navigating *away* from. This blocked the user from entering steps like Step 8 (Interpretation), Step 12 (Decisions), and Step 14 (Overall Position) since these fields were naturally empty before the user reached and filled them.
   - **Resolution:** Modified `validateStepDependency` to check mandatory fields of `targetStep - 1`. This allows users to navigate freely into each step and strictly enforces completion only when leaving the step.

---

## 🚀 Patient Validation, UI Autocomplete, & Wizard Flow Fixes"
